name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Notification: your response needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This will just take two seconds. |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

The President has asked us to reach out to some of our top supporters for a one-question poll, and as one of our best, you've been chosen to participate.

**Please take a moment to choose one of the options below to answer the following:**

The President's job performance has been...
**[GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa32dda8bc433b527417560707493bd0cb492ab383a83a7b667416bd73ba6119cd27c75d0f35f0598bf3ee1c04fa92ba6c2)** **[GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa35aa0ab76792b0342d38c65a97488345f85bc98e19071a608fc289bc1d5186d3c21e249e8e786cfc3207c5d186dbe8e5b)** **[OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa34291345d63109b9a9098e37588737a35741473ce82b5648b8888e54b3a278fc1787874dd715c899b3761b49774b5c8bc)** **[OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa325cddf74c08823c68b820ded2169578296690a52887efdbf8f4274bc2690a0f439027848a9b9ba6f5de46b19bb0a4dc2)**
Thank you for your input, Friend.

**We 'll be sure to pass it along to President Trump.**

Presidential Polling
Team Trump
---
[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa373df01ad004ac4cf218d6cedd0ee043c532e8721f547f018434252ac38025a14a82d7ee4d89ebbac8430d7db148ec59c)
---

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa323cef994dfe7d777ad87dcadf6bb5a88cab0f6a58d6fb47f9625d60ff47a807d802b7f4628a863060a810d6ac85b9ff8) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa3a76b37919d7ac2e33fe10c8763b2c5a266ef60e5ca1ddb2722f4e7706c843070e81c2c64a24ff0e1787618a642b6f58d) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff481148755cafa3ee8ca88a4e1b01e9d35306c21f1962961807bc12177083adb5bf4371d23db6528ebdab125cd6ef57d65229169267a39e) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256cc70a4c9684a6f1636b00ea9e4540bcd983a213ac30218abfc17a0fe0481b40ad)

name: Team Kaine Tax Update
subject: It's official - the bad GOP tax bill has passed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
**TL;DR** \-- In the middle of the night on Friday, Senate Republicans jammed through a major tax bill that's bad for our future, for the middle class, for women, for kids, for seniors, for students, for workers... just about the only people it's good for are the wealthiest folks in the country and CEOs of large corporations.

This is completely unfair and goes against the best interests of the vast majority of Americans. **Fired up?**
**[Add your name right now to say you're against this GOP tax bill.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WEx4lNmlSd%2FTwPZFksk4mBk3EHsR3HxJ)**
Derek --

It's official. Late Friday night, despite the best efforts of Democrats to offer alternative solutions, and thousands upon thousands of Americans calling on Congress to kill the bill, the Senate voted 51-49 to pass the disastrous GOP tax bill.

**As a reminder, here are a few things this bill would do:**
* **Create tax cuts for large corporations and the wealthiest Americans** \--> For the top 0.1% of families, that means an average cut of $208,060.

* **Create tax _hikes_ for millions of middle-class families** \--> After the individual tax cuts expire in 2025, chances are that if you're an average middle-class family who doesn't own stock in corporations, you're seeing a substantial tax hike.

* **Repeal the Affordable Care Act's individual mandate** \--> This could lead to 13 *million* fewer people having health insurance.

* **Completely explode the deficit** \--> We're looking at adding $1.4 trillion to the deficit in the next ten years.

And here are a few groups of people this bill would be really bad for:
* **Women** \--> Many of the impacts disproportionately affect women.

* **Kids** \--> That $1.4 trillion that's going to be added to the deficit is debt we're putting on the shoulders of our kids and grandkids.

* **Seniors** \--> Another impact of that $1.4 trillion? Likely cuts to Medicare, in a big way.

* **Workers** \--> The tax cuts going to corporations will land in the pockets of CEOs and shareholders, not the workers.

**This bill is offensive to just about every American family. It's irresponsible, and it will completely upend the economy -- at the expense of the middle class.**

**[Add your name to our petition right now and say you're against this bill.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=C8COsKce3oEDDUQFMhCiGhk3EHsR3HxJ)**

In solidarity,

Team Kaine | | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=x%2FiavfhRZu42PtEOZviODRk3EHsR3HxJ)
---

_ | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=GXES1WAbQGRMmNdlqjVH8Bk3EHsR3HxJ).
---
_
__
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Kevin
subject: re: Christmas party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

This is your last chance to enter to win tickets to meet Paul Ryan and other Republican leaders at a Christmas party in Washington, D.C.

Are you interested? [**Enter now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MzIwMTgzNjgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDM0NTIxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzIwMTgzNjgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDM0NTIxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

If you win, we've got flights and a hotel covered for you and a friend.****

Hope to see you soon,

Kevin
Team Ryan

| [_Enter now_ >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzIwMTgzNjgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDM0NTIxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.

No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzIwMTgzNjgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDM0NTIxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzIwMTgzNjgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDM0NTIxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on November 29, 2017, at Noon (12:00 p.m.) Eastern Standard Time and ends on December 3, 2017, at 11:59 p.m. ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Standard Time on the last day of the contest. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets within the continental United States to Washington, DC, on a date to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) two-night hotel stay in the Washington, D.C., metro area with an approximate retail value of $1,000 and two (2) tickets to attend a Christmas party on a day of the Sponsor's choosing ("Credential") with an approximate retail value of $0. Approximate total retail value is $2,000. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MzIwMTgzNjgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDM0NTIxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0). Sponsor is Team Ryan, 320 1st St. SE, Washington, D.C. 20003.

Important: By participating in this Promotion, you agree to be bound by the Official Rules below and represent that you satisfy all eligibility requirements. The Promotion is void where prohibited.

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=32018368&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDM0NTIxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

name: breaking-news@dscc.org
subject: re: GOP tax vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senate Republicans just passed their disastrous tax bill. Fight back now: make the GOP regret this vote in 2018.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171203-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

Friday night, Senate Republicans passed their disastrous tax bill.

They voted to raise taxes on working families and cause millions of Americans to lose their health insurance -- all to pay for _massive_ tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy.

**Every single Senate Democrat voted against this bill.** But in the end, Senate Republicans put their Wall Street mega-donors before working Americans.

**And now, there 's only one way for us to fight back: replace Senate Republicans in 2018.**

**Contribute right now to respond to the vote and prove you 're ready to defeat the GOP in 2018 >>**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?amount=1&refcode=DPE-20171203-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](http://action.dscc. We have to make sure that every Republican who voted for this awful bill faces the consequences for it -- and that means we're counting on supporters like you to step up right now.

[**Pitch in $1 to fight back and prove you 're ready to make Republicans regret this vote in 2018 >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20171203-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Team DSCC

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
